description: Tests serialisation of fields that are slices of generic types, both local and external. This specifically targets a bug where '[]T' was misclassified as a named type needing a PackagePath.

assertions.description: The 'Items' field (type []T) on the generic struct should have an empty PackagePath.
The 'Boxes' field (type []Box[string]) should have a PackagePath pointing to its own package.
The 'Stores' field (type []models.Store[int]) should have a PackagePath pointing to the 'models' package.
